subtitle.ja: はじめの構えから始めます。左小指向こうの糸を、右親指で向こう側から取ります
subtitle.en: Begin in "Position 1". With the right thumb, move over from the far side and pick down the far left–little-finger string.

subtitle.ja: 右小指向こう側の糸を、左親指で取ります
subtitle.en: Pick down the far right–little-finger string with the left thumb.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Release the little-finger strings from both hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指向こう側の2本の糸を、親指を除く4本の指で握ります
subtitle.en: With all fingers except the thumbs, grasp the two far thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指手前側にある斜めの糸を人差し指で取り、親指同士を繋ぐ水平の糸に人差し指を乗せて上から取ります
subtitle.en: With both index fingers, pick up from below the diagonal near thumb strings and place the index fingers onto the horizontal string linking the thumbs, moving over and picking it down.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Release the thumb strings from both hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指手前側にある斜めの糸を親指の背で取り、小指同士を繋ぐ水平の糸を親指で向こう側から取ります
subtitle.en: With the backs of both thumbs, move over and pick down the near diagonal little-finger strings, then move over from the far side and pick down the horizontal string linking the little fingers.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指薬指小指で握っていた糸を離します
subtitle.en: Release the strings held by the middle, ring, and little fingers of both hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の菱形の中に小指を下から入れ、菱形の親指側の糸を握ります
subtitle.en: Insert both little fingers from below into the left and right diamonds and grasp the thumb-side diamond strings.

subtitle.ja: 左親指の輪に右親指を上から入れ、左親指の輪を右親指に移します
subtitle.en: Insert the right thumb from above into the left-thumb loop and transfer the left-thumb loop to the right thumb.

subtitle.ja: 右親指の2本の輪に左親指を下から入れて輪を広げます
subtitle.en: Insert the left thumb from below into the two right-thumb loops and open the loops.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の輪に親指を下から入れて輪を広げます
subtitle.en: Insert both thumbs from below into the index loops and open the loops.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指にかかる上の1本の糸を残したまま、下の2本の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: Retain the single upper thumb string on both thumbs and release only the two lower strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Release the index strings from both hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指の輪に人差し指を上から入れ、小指の輪を人差し指に移します
subtitle.en: Insert both index fingers from above into the little-finger loops and transfer the little-finger loops to the index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の輪に小指を下から入れ、親指の輪を小指に移します。形を整えて完成です
subtitle.en: Insert both little fingers from below into the thumb loops and transfer the thumb loops to the little fingers; adjust the figure to show the finished form.

subtitle.ja: 人差し指を左右に動かすことでカヤックが漕ぎ出します
subtitle.en: By moving the index fingers from side to side, the kayak begins to paddle.
